description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a wide-brimmed straw hat and a red patterned bandana covering the lower face. The individual wears a dark hooded jacket with white sleeves, layered over a red shirt, and has a crossbody bag slung across the chest. The outfit includes knee-length cargo shorts and white sneakers, with visible accessories such as a wristband and a utility strap on the right leg. The figure's hands are gloved, and the overall appearance suggests a streetwise, practical style suitable for city environments. The clothing and accessories are detailed, with realistic folds, seams, and textures, giving the figure a lifelike presence.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual urban clothing with a straw hat, bandana, hooded jacket, crossbody bag, cargo shorts, and sneakers.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the straw hat, red bandana, crossbody bag, and the back of the hooded jacket with visible utility straps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, bandana, crossbody bag, and the layered clothing with visible arm accessories.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full back of the jacket, hood, crossbody bag strap, and both legs with utility details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the hat, bandana, and the utility strap on the right leg, as well as the layered clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded jacket, cargo shorts, crossbody bag, gloves, wide-brimmed hat, bandana
